programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
Supertubos might offer some 0.9m ramps today, if you enjoy battling a bit of chop.
🌊 Swell: 0.9m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h NNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 22.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
Just enough 0.9m of Atlantic to maybe avoid total boredom, if you're really desperate.
🌊 Swell: 0.9m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h NNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 22.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
Just enough 0.9m of Atlantic to maybe avoid total boredom, if you're really desperate.
🌊 Swell: 0.9m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h NNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 22.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
The 0.9m swell and onshore wind suggest a session best spent watching from the cafe.
🌊 Swell: 0.9m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h NNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 22.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
Those 0.9m waves will offer a bit of a bumpy ride, best suited for practicing airs and wipeouts in the onshore wind.
🌊 Swell: 0.9m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h NNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 22.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
Those 0.9m waves will offer a bit of a bumpy ride, best suited for practicing airs and wipeouts in the onshore wind.

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With a 0.9m swell and that wind, you'll get some exercise paddling, maybe a closeout or two.
🌊 Swell: 0.9m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h NNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 22.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
The 0.9m swell and onshore breeze suggest a vigorous paddle followed by disappointment.
🌊 Swell: 0.9m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h NNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 22.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 1.0m @ 10s CROSS
programme.desc:
With that crosswind, these 1.0m waves will likely offer more frustration than fun today.
🌊 Swell: 1.0m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h NW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 35.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: 🌊 1.0m @ 10s CROSS
programme.desc:
Those 1.0m waves will offer a ride or two if you're desperate to get pounded by the Atlantic.
🌊 Swell: 1.0m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 17.0km/h NNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 1.0m @ 10s CROSS
programme.desc:
A meter and a crosswind? Could be worse, could be productive, could be a sandy beating.
🌊 Swell: 1.0m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 17.0km/h NNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 1.0m @ 10s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
One meter and onshore? Probably better to watch the fishermen get wet.
🌊 Swell: 1.0m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 17.0km/h NNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 1.0m @ 10s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With that 1.0m and onshore breeze, expect a workout, not a revelation.
🌊 Swell: 1.0m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 17.0km/h NNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 1.0m @ 10s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With a metre of swell and onshore wind, today's session will be a character-building experience, at best.
🌊 Swell: 1.0m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 17.0km/h NNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 1.0m @ 10s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
